message.message: Agent 0: I will fill the Bowl with water using the faucet, then deliver it to the CounterTop.
Agent 1: I will slice the Lettuce and deliver it to the CounterTop while you handle the water.

plan.high_level_plan: Pick up the Bowl, turn on the faucet, fill it with water, turn the faucet off, then deliver it to the CounterTop.
Navigate to the Lettuce, slice it, pick it up, then deliver it to the CounterTop. Compact JSON retry recovered from long-prompt parse failure.
